Idioma.AYUDA_EsteProcesoPermiteRealizarLaExport: This process permits to carry out the export of the referring monthly information to the salaries yielded by each one of the employees of the business; this file is generated based on the structure requested by the social security and that will be utilize
Idioma.LB_NoExisteElFormatoRequerido: Error!, The Format Required doesn't exists!, Process Canceled!
